title: Final energy consumption in road transport by type of fuel (Eurostat)
description:
[Publisher: Eurostat]

Consumption by several road vehicle categories, by type of fuel (according to the Standard International Energy product Classification - SIEC). Expressed in thousand tonnes of oil equivalent. Off-road use of fuels (for example: cranes and excavators at construction sites, harvesters and tractors on fields) is excluded from road transport and included in the respective sector of consumption (such as industry or agriculture).
